title: macrotorus utriculatus
intro: Macrotorus utriculatus, also known as the sea holly or globe thistle, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been found to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Macrotorus utriculatus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, with the flowers and leaves typically used for medicinal purposes.
